forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 59. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 72, with temperatures falling to around 70 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 6 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

weather_report:
In the early hours of a Wednesday morning in Downtown San Francisco, the air is crisp and tranquil, painting a perfect canvas for a day yet to unfold. With temperatures settling at a comfortable 59 degrees, the skies remain mostly clear, an omen of the sun’s embrace just around the corner. As the morning light breaks, the forecast promises a welcoming warmth, with highs nudging towards 72. There's a soft breeze, whispering from the southwest at about 7 mph, a gentle companion to the day ahead.

As the city awakens, the outlook is decidedly pleasant. The sunny disposition will gradually shift temperatures to around 70 in the afternoon, accompanied by a playful wind that may gust up to 22 mph, adding a refreshing touch to the sunlight. While remnants of fog may linger along the coastline, the day is set to encourage exploration—perfect for a stroll along the waterfront or a visit to one of the city’s inviting cafes to sip a warm beverage while watching the world go by. Keep layers handy; a light jacket in the early hours and perhaps a comfortable t-shirt as the sun reaches its zenith will keep you cozy as the day transitions from the cool embrace of dawn to the warm glow of midday.
